theater_description: Iranian missile strike that demolished a synagogue and nearby homes in Beit Shemesh, Israel.
geometry_method_note: Fallback civilian exposure uses Beit Shemesh municipal population because the strike-footprint population around the impacted block was not available.
military_area_note: No military victims are reported for this strike episode, and no military exposure denominator is relevant to the central Iran-on-Israel civilian path.
civilian_area_note: Municipal population is broader than the directly impacted block and therefore suitable only for fallback intensity.
split_reason: Kept separate from all-Israel bombardment totals so that a tightly bounded, source-grounded civilian episode can be published without forcing a nationwide denominator.
quality_note: Strike-specific civilian deaths and child deaths are strong, but the denominator is only municipal-level and military comparison data are absent.
